title: Feedback in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger feedback in practice judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Feedback in Practice is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Feedback in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good feedback in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Feedback in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
